creator: maurice@castro.aus.net
text:
Hi Edwin,
	there appear to be some issues with Davical that I cannot =
resolve that would make this upgrade break iPhone and iCal users; I am =
temporarily halting work on this patch until I can find a solution that =
allows all users to upgrade successfully.

	Maurice Castro

On 06/01/2010, at 3:30 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of www/davical,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/142369 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/142369
>=20
> --=20
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
